name: revquiz-platform
description: Full-stack quiz platform for students - faculty selection, course quizzes, difficulty levels, and admin content management

scripts.seed: cd server && pnpm ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/seeder.ts
scripts.docker:seed: docker compose exec server pnpm ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register scripts/seeder.ts

author: Abdelrahman Mohamed
